creator: michaelo@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Anton Saietskii from comment #24)

In theory I can create a review for those, but looking at the log between master and 3.4.2 there are so many changes that I consider 3.4.2 unusable. First of all, I'd like to give Bryan the chance to respond after all. If that does not happen I will consider to add one-off patches to poudriere-devel.
